nasb.text: “Do not think that I came to abolish the Law or the Prophets; I did not come to abolish but to fulfill.

esv.text: “Do not think that I have come to abolish     the Law or the Prophets; I have not come to abolish them but     to fulfill them.

cnv.text: “你們不要以為我來是要廢除律法和先知；我來不是要廢除，而是要完成。

ccb.text: “不要以为我是来废除律法和先知书，我不是来废除，乃是来成全。

csbs.text: “你们不要以为我来是要废除律法和先知    ，我来不是要废除，而是要成全。
